title: omphalodes runemarkii
intro: Omphalodes runemarkii, also known as the Runemark's Navelwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Omphalodes runemarkii include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as acting as an antispasmodic and expectorant. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
